可，就在他即将形神俱灭时，他的魂儿，却因灵魂羁绊，而意外穿越到了仙域一个花花公子的身上。
花花公子身中剧毒，需不定期与女子同修，方能保证肉身不灭。
一心只爱一人的纯情少男林言，又怎么忍心做出这种事呢？
是的，魂穿浪荡子的他，迫不得已，真的做了。
为解此毒，找寻挚爱，他不得已加入了合欢宗，成了宗门有史以来第一个男弟子。
本以为入宗之后，就能解了那毒，谁曾想，解毒却是一个漫长的过程……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o345b6bfbffa483a0d0a71ec090395d3f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"幽沫","author_id":"","book_id":"7530140159262608408","book_name":"魂穿仙域做浪仙，女帝求我莫疯癫","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7530689944021385752","read_count":"416","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"200737"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"96","tags":"东方仙侠,玄幻,奇幻仙侠,东方玄幻,魂穿,空间,多女主,女帝","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o345b6bfbffa483a0d0a71ec090395d3f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779177756&x-signature=%2BGgmQuHnYO0IDDpxRJotEbdulgw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"99903232184","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":
